day_to_day.description: No day-to-day bonuses

cop.name: Hyper Repair
cop.description: Restores 2 HP to all own units

scop.name: Hyper Upgrade
scop.description: +10% ATK and DEF to all own units (SCOPB only; no unique bonus)

day_to_day.description: +20% ATK for indirect units, -10% ATK for direct units

cop.name: Snipe Attack
cop.description: +1 attack range to all indirect units

scop.name: Super Snipe
scop.description: +2 attack range to indirect units; +30% additional ATK for indirect units

day_to_day.description: +30% ATK and DEF to all units; own units cost 120% of base price

cop.name: Morale Boost
cop.description: +10% additional ATK and DEF to all own units

scop.name: Samurai Spirit
scop.description: +10% additional ATK and DEF to all own units; counterattacks deal 1.5x damage

day_to_day.description: +20% ATK for naval units

cop.name: Tsunami
cop.description: All enemy units take 1 HP damage; all enemy air units lose 1 fuel per tile

scop.name: Typhoon
scop.description: All enemy units take 2 HP damage; all enemy air units lose 2 fuel per tile

day_to_day.description: +20% ATK for direct units, -10% ATK for indirect units

cop.name: Max Force
cop.description: +10% additional ATK for direct units

scop.name: Max Blast
scop.description: +25% additional ATK for direct units (total +45% over base with D2D)

day_to_day.description: +30% ATK for infantry and mech; -10% ATK for vehicles; double capture speed for infantry and mech

cop.name: Double Time
cop.description: +1 movement to all infantry units

scop.name: Victory March
scop.description: All infantry and mech units can complete a capture in one step regardless of remaining HP; +1 movement to infantry

day_to_day.description: Own units suffer no movement penalty in snow; snow falls at the start of Olaf's turns; +10% ATK/DEF in snow (always active for Olaf)

cop.name: Blizzard
cop.description: Causes snowfall; all enemy units lose 1 movement

scop.name: Winter Fury
scop.description: All enemy units take 2 HP damage; causes snowfall; own units unaffected by snow movement penalties

day_to_day.description: +15% ATK for air units, -15% ATK for naval units

cop.name: Lightning Drive
cop.description: +10% additional ATK for air units

scop.name: Lightning Strike
scop.description: All air units may move and act a second time this turn (excluding units that already acted)

day_to_day.description: +1 movement to all own units

cop.name: Sideslip
cop.description: +1 additional movement to all own units (stacks with D2D for +2 total)

scop.name: Sidewinder
scop.description: +2 additional movement to all own units (stacks with D2D for +3 total)

day_to_day.description: +10% ATK to all units

cop.name: Black Wave
cop.description: All enemy units take 1 HP damage; all own units recover 1 HP

scop.name: Black Storm
scop.description: All enemy units take 2 HP damage; all own units recover 2 HP

day_to_day.description: +40% ATK for infantry, mech, and copter units; -10% ATK for vehicles and naval; spawns mechs on owned bases at turn start

cop.name: Copter Command
cop.description: +30% additional ATK for copter units; spawns one infantry on each owned city

scop.name: Airborne Assault
scop.description: Spawns one infantry on every owned city and base

day_to_day.description: +10% ATK for vehicles, +20% ATK for naval; own vehicles are refueled and rearmed at the start of each turn

cop.name: Turbo Charge
cop.description: +10% additional ATK for vehicles; all vehicles gain +2 movement

scop.name: Overdrive
scop.description: +20% additional ATK for vehicles; all vehicles gain +2 movement and are fully refueled and rearmed

day_to_day.description: All own units cost 80% of base price; earns +10% bonus funds per owned property

cop.name: Gold Rush
cop.description: Current fund total is multiplied by 1.5

scop.name: Power of Money
scop.description: ATK is boosted proportional to current fund total (more funds = higher ATK bonus)

day_to_day.description: Gains bonus ATK equal to the terrain star rating of the tile the attacking unit occupies

cop.name: Terrain Tactics
cop.description: Terrain star value counts double for defensive purposes for all own units

scop.name: Prime Tactics
scop.description: Terrain star value counts double for both ATK (D2D bonus doubled) and DEF for all own units

day_to_day.description: All own units cost 50% of base price when deployed from cities

cop.name: Barter
cop.description: All unit production costs reduced to 50% for one turn regardless of deployment location

scop.name: Merchant Union
scop.description: Own units can be deployed from any owned city (not just bases/airports/ports); all unit costs reduced to 50%

day_to_day.description: +1 vision range to all own units; own units reveal enemy HP values; counterattacks deal full damage regardless of own HP

cop.name: Enhanced Vision
cop.description: +2 additional vision to all own units (total +3 over base); own units can see into forests and ambush units

scop.name: Counter Break
scop.description: Own counterattacks deal 1.5x normal damage; enemy units cannot counter-attack this turn

day_to_day.description: Earns bonus funds each turn equal to the number of enemy CO power stars charged

cop.name: Market Crash
cop.description: Drains all enemy CO power bars by 1 star per city Sasha owns

scop.name: War Bonds
scop.description: Earns funds equal to the total HP damage dealt to enemies this turn

day_to_day.description: +30% ATK to all units, -20% DEF for all units

cop.name: Knuckleduster
cop.description: +10% additional ATK to all own units

scop.name: Haymaker
scop.description: +30% additional ATK to all own units (total +60% ATK over base with D2D)

day_to_day.description: +10% ATK bonus when own units attack from a road tile

cop.name: Forced March
cop.description: +1 movement to all own units when moving on road tiles

scop.name: Trail of Woe
scop.description: +30% ATK bonus when attacking from roads; +2 movement on road tiles for all own units

day_to_day.description: +10% ATK bonus when own units attack from a plain tile

cop.name: Beat Down
cop.description: +10% additional ATK for units on plains; small additional bonus for all others

scop.name: Block Rock
scop.description: +30% ATK for units on plains; +10% ATK for all other units

day_to_day.description: Earns +50% funds from all owned cities; +30% ATK bonus when attacking from a city tile

cop.name: Urban Blight
cop.description: +30% additional ATK from city tiles; all enemy units on city tiles take 1 HP damage

scop.name: High Society
scop.description: +50% ATK from city tiles; all enemy units on city tiles take 2 HP damage

day_to_day.description: +10% luck bonus (attack damage can randomly roll 0-20% higher than base)

cop.name: Lucky Star
cop.description: +30% additional luck bonus for this turn (total 0-50% lucky bonus range)

scop.name: Lady Luck
scop.description: +60% additional luck bonus for this turn (total 0-80% lucky bonus range)

day_to_day.description: Random ±10% luck variance; damage fluctuates unpredictably (can exceed or fall below normal)

cop.name: Brute Force
cop.description: Increases random luck range by +10%; higher ceiling but also higher floor variance

scop.name: Barbaric Blow
scop.description: Increases random luck range by +30%; very high ceiling with significant variance

day_to_day.description: Random ±15% luck variance (more extreme than Flak); wider damage fluctuation range

cop.name: Overclock
cop.description: Increases random luck range by +15%; wider ceiling and deeper floor variance than Flak's COP

scop.name: Firestorm
scop.description: Increases random luck range by +35%; extremely high ceiling with severe variance

day_to_day.description: +10% DEF from comm towers; gains additional +30% DEF per comm tower owned

cop.name: Tower Shield
cop.description: +20% additional DEF per comm tower owned for all own units

scop.name: Tower of Power
scop.description: +40% ATK and +40% DEF per comm tower owned for all own units

day_to_day.description: +10% luck bonus (attack damage can randomly roll 0-20% higher than base)

cop.name: Lucky Lass
cop.description: Calls in 3 random missile strikes on enemy units; moderate AOE damage

scop.name: Covering Fire
scop.description: Calls in 3 powerful missile barrages targeting enemy units; high AOE damage

day_to_day.description: +10% ATK and DEF to all units; own units suffer no movement penalty from any weather condition

cop.name: Meteor Strike
cop.description: Fires a large meteor at a targeted area dealing significant HP damage in a wide AOE

scop.name: Fury Storm
scop.description: Fires a devastating meteor at a targeted area dealing severe HP damage in a very wide AOE (larger and stronger than Meteor Strike)

day_to_day.description: +10% ATK and DEF to all units; own units consume 1 less fuel per turn

scop.name: Ex Machina
scop.description: Fires a massive bolt targeting a large area; deals significant HP damage and stuns all affected enemy units (they cannot move or act for one turn)
